name: English
hero_pill: QR Scanner Pro+ — now with Google Drive backup
hero_desc: Simple, powerful mobile apps that save your time and just work.
feat_1_desc: Instant scanning with real-time detection. No loading, no waiting.
feat_2_desc: Your data stays on your device. No tracking, no external servers.
feat_3_desc: Optional Google Drive backup keeps your scan history safely stored.
app_desc: Fast, reliable QR code and barcode scanner with history, favorites, Google Drive backup, and beautiful themes.
cta_desc: We're building new tools to make your daily life simpler.
priv_overview_p1: QR Scanner Pro+ & Barcode ("the App"), developed by Golden Roots, respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains what data the App accesses, how it is used, how it is shared, and your choices regarding your data.
priv_overview_p2: By using the App, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy.
priv_perm_cam_p: The App uses your device's camera to scan QR codes and barcodes. All scan processing is performed locally on your device. No camera data is transmitted to any server or third party.
priv_perm_photo_p: The App may access your photo library to scan QR codes from saved images. Selected images are processed entirely on your device and are never uploaded to any external server.
priv_perm_hist_p: Your scan history, including scanned content and optional thumbnail images, is stored locally on your device using an encrypted local database. This data never leaves your device unless you explicitly choose to back it up via Google Drive.
priv_gdrive_p: The App offers an optional Google Drive backup feature. When you choose to use this feature:
priv_gdrive_li1: The App requests access to Google Drive's app-specific storage (appDataFolder) only.
priv_gdrive_li2: Your scan history data is encrypted in transit (HTTPS/TLS) and stored in a private folder that only this App can access.
priv_gdrive_li3: No other files on your Google Drive are accessed, read, or modified.
priv_gdrive_li4: You can disconnect your Google account or delete the backup data at any time through the App's settings.
priv_gsign_p: If you use the Google Drive backup feature, you will be asked to sign in with your Google account. The App accesses only the following information:
priv_gsign_li1: Email address — to display which account is connected
priv_gsign_li2: Display name — to show your name in the settings screen
priv_gsign_li3: Profile photo — to show your avatar in the settings screen
priv_gsign_p2: This information is used only for display purposes within the App and is not stored on any external server or shared with any third party.
priv_ads_p1: The App displays advertisements using the following third-party advertising SDKs:
priv_ads_admob_data: Device identifiers (Advertising ID), app interactions, diagnostics
priv_ads_applovin_data: Device identifiers (Advertising ID), app interactions, diagnostics
priv_ads_p2: These SDKs may collect data automatically to serve relevant advertisements. You can opt out of personalized ads through your device's advertising settings:
priv_ads_optout: Android: Settings → Privacy → Ads → Delete advertising ID
priv_ads_links: For more information, see: Google Privacy Policy | AppLovin Privacy Policy
priv_analytics_p1: The App uses Firebase Analytics to collect anonymous usage statistics including:
priv_analytics_p2: This data is aggregated and cannot be used to identify individual users. It is used solely to improve the App's performance and user experience.
priv_analytics_link: For more information, see: Firebase Privacy Policy
priv_sum_encrypted: All collected data is encrypted in transit using HTTPS/TLS.
priv_delete_p: You can request deletion of your data through the following methods:
priv_delete_p1: Open the App → go to the History tab → long press or swipe to delete individual items, or use "Delete All" to clear all scan history, favorites, and saved images.
priv_delete_p2: Open the App → go to Settings → tap your connected Google account → tap "Disconnect" to revoke access. Then:
priv_delete_li1: Go to Google Drive → Settings → Manage Apps
priv_delete_li3: Select "Delete hidden app data" to permanently remove all backup files
priv_delete_p3: Uninstall the App from your device to remove all locally stored data, including scan history, favorites, images, and app settings.
priv_delete_note: Important: We do not maintain any user data on our own servers. All data is stored locally on your device or in your personal Google Drive account.
priv_security_p: We take the security of your data seriously. The following measures are in place:
priv_security_li1: All data transmitted between the App and external services is encrypted using HTTPS/TLS
priv_security_li2: Scan history is stored in a local encrypted database on your device
priv_security_li3: Google Drive backup uses Google's secure infrastructure with app-specific isolated storage
priv_security_li4: The App does not store any user data on external servers owned or operated by Golden Roots
priv_noaccount_p: The App is fully functional without creating an account or providing any personal information. Google Sign-In is only required for the optional Google Drive backup feature. You can use all scanning, history, and favorite features without signing in.
priv_children_p: This App is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and believe that your child has provided personal data through the App, please contact us so we can take appropriate action.
priv_changes_p: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in the App or applicable laws. Any changes will be reflected on this page with an updated "Last updated" date. We encourage you to review this page periodically.
priv_contact_p: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, need assistance with data deletion, or have concerns about your privacy, please contact us at:
meta_title: Golden Roots – Simple, Powerful Mobile Apps
meta_description: Golden Roots crafts simple, powerful mobile apps that make everyday tasks easier. Download QR Scanner Pro+ on Google Play.
priv_meta_title: Privacy Policy – QR Scanner Pro+ & Barcode | Golden Roots
priv_meta_description: Privacy Policy for QR Scanner Pro+ & Barcode by Golden Roots. Learn how your data is collected, used, and protected.
about_story_p1: Golden Roots is a small, passionate team dedicated to creating mobile applications that simplify everyday tasks. Founded with the belief that technology should be accessible, intuitive, and respectful of user privacy.
about_story_p2: We started with a simple idea: build apps that we ourselves would love to use — fast, reliable, and free from unnecessary complexity.
about_mission_p: To craft simple, powerful mobile applications that save people time and make daily tasks effortless. We believe great software should work seamlessly, respect your privacy, and be available to everyone.
about_val1_p: Your data belongs to you. We design our apps so your information stays on your device. No tracking, no selling data, no external servers storing your personal information.
about_val2_p: We believe the best apps are the ones that just work. No bloated features, no confusing interfaces — just clean, focused tools that do what you need.
about_val3_p: Every feature is carefully tested and optimized for performance. We'd rather do fewer things exceptionally well than many things poorly.
about_val4_p: Our apps support multiple languages and are designed to be used by everyone, regardless of technical expertise. Technology should break down barriers, not create them.
about_apps_p: Tools designed to make your life simpler.
about_app1_p: Our flagship app — a fast, reliable QR code and barcode scanner with scan history, favorites, optional Google Drive backup, and beautiful themes. Available on Google Play with 12,000+ downloads.
about_apps_more: More apps are coming soon. We're always working on new tools to make your daily life simpler.
about_contact_p: Have questions, feedback, or just want to say hello? We'd love to hear from you.
about_meta_description: Learn about Golden Roots — a passionate team crafting simple, powerful mobile apps that make everyday tasks easier.
tos_accept_p1: By downloading, installing, or using QR Scanner Pro+ & Barcode (the App), developed by Golden Roots, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service (Terms).
tos_accept_p2: If you do not agree to these Terms, please do not use the App.
tos_service_p: The App provides QR code and barcode scanning, scan history management, favorites, optional Google Drive backup, and related features. The App is provided free of charge and is available on Android via Google Play.
tos_accounts_p1: The App does not require you to create an account. All core features — scanning, history, favorites — are fully accessible without signing in.
tos_accounts_p2: Google Sign-In is only required for the optional Google Drive backup feature. By using Google Sign-In, you also agree to Google's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
tos_use_p: You agree to use the App only for lawful purposes. You shall not:
tos_use_li1: Reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble the App
tos_use_li2: Use the App for any illegal or unauthorized purpose
tos_use_li3: Distribute malware or harmful code through or in connection with the App
tos_use_li4: Attempt to interfere with the proper functioning of the App
tos_use_li5: Misrepresent your identity or affiliation with any person or organization
tos_ip_p1: All content, design, graphics, code, and other materials in the App are the property of Golden Roots and are protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
tos_ip_p2: You retain full ownership of your scan data, history, and any content you create within the App.
tos_gdrive_p: If you choose to use the Google Drive backup feature:
tos_gdrive_li1: The backup is subject to Google's Terms of Service and storage policies
tos_gdrive_li2: Data is stored in an app-specific folder accessible only by this App
tos_gdrive_li3: You are responsible for maintaining access to your Google account
tos_gdrive_li4: Golden Roots is not liable for any data loss resulting from Google service disruptions or account issues
tos_thirdparty_p: The App uses the following third-party services, each governed by their own terms:
tos_disclaimer_p1: The App is provided as-is and as-available without warranties of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.
tos_disclaimer_p2: Golden Roots does not guarantee the accuracy of scanned content or the continuous availability of the App.
tos_liability_p: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Golden Roots shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the App. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid for the App.
tos_termination_p: You may stop using the App at any time by uninstalling it from your device. Golden Roots reserves the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue the App at any time without prior notice.
tos_changes_p: We may update these Terms from time to time. Changes will be reflected on this page with an updated last-updated date. Your continued use of the App after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.
tos_law_p: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Thailand, without regard to conflict of law provisions.
tos_contact_p: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at:
tos_meta_description: Terms of Service for QR Scanner Pro+ & Barcode by Golden Roots. Read our terms and conditions for using the app.
